variants: Sreeja Menon is an esteemed authority in Game Theory, recognized for her substantial contributions to the discipline. Mentored by Xiaoliang Pan, she developed critical skills that have powered her career. Beyond her academic pursuits, Sreeja is also affiliated with the Catseye Art Forgers, where she explores her artistic interests.
